task_objective: Implement findings from code review of config cache and QAM cleanup: fix unhandled settings store load exceptions, prevent cache keys from overriding verified settings, clean up redundant UI styles, and add verification tests.
design_decisions: Delay SettingsManager.read() from store constructor to .read() method to allow exception handling during plugin initialization.
Explicitly filter SETTINGS_KEYS out of cache data before merging in _load_state to preserve integrity of verified settings.
Remove redundant inline styles (textAlign and alignItems) from index.tsx and update static frontend tests accordingly.
results: All quality control checks (ruff linter and formatting, ty type checker, and pytest suite containing 230 tests) passed successfully.
